docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, PATRICIA
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-01-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OUTSIDE OF THE COURTROOM. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT MAY BE ISSUED. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA GUTIERREZ IS PRESENT. NAILAH SUMCHAI, WITNESS, TESTIFIES ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA BROOKS IS PRESENT. STEPHANIE RHODES, WITNESS, TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,048.96 FILED BY GUTIERREZ, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, CLAUDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, PATRICIA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE WAIVED) SERVED JAN-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, CLAUDIA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
